scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock && corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate'
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
